evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Build standards, documentation, and data catalogs for the organization
evidence.collaboration_width: Partner with business and technical stakeholders from problem framing to shipped artefacts

evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Build standards, documentation, and data catalogs for the organization

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Build standards, documentation, and data catalogs for the organization
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple rigour signals (standards, documentation, data catalogs, sound modeling judgment) with no velocity language present.
domain_risk_reasoning: GDPR handling is a constraint; primary risk is business analytics accuracy for sales/marketing/product decisions, not financial reporting or regulatory compliance.
data_team_maturity_quote: Design, own, and evolve core data models and the modelling architecture
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Language emphasizes evolving existing infrastructure and building standards, indicating an established team scaling rather than starting from zero.
jd_authorship_reasoning: The responsibilities section relies entirely on generic boilerplate action verbs and stakeholder collaboration language; it lacks specific tools, methodologies, technical depth, or Tuesday-morning context that would indicate hiring manager authorship.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Build standards, documentation, and data catalogs for the organization
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: Primary focus on building data infrastructure and organizational standards indicates the role primarily serves the data function and its consumers rather than external business stakeholders.
autonomy_level_quote: Design, own, and evolve core data models and the modelling architecture
autonomy_level_reasoning: Responsibility to design and own data architecture indicates strategic autonomy to define technical direction rather than execute direction set by others.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Design, own, and evolve core data models and the modelling architecture; Build standards, documentation, and data catalogs for the organization
ai_role_quote: Design, own, and evolve core data models and the modelling architecture
ai_role_reasoning: Standard data modeling work with no AI-ready, semantic model, or AI infrastructure signals.
testing_framing_quote: Build standards, documentation, and data catalogs for the organization
testing_framing_reasoning: Standards and documentation work do not reference testing ownership, quality practice, or data contracts.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Regulatory compliance (GDPR) drives loss-aversion framing as a primary concern.
